name: hcportal_getPendingNewsflashes
description: Returns all newsflashes that are currently due to be shown to the authenticated user, ordered by StartDate ASC. A newsflash is due when it is active (not deleted, within its date range), visible to the user (platform-wide or the user is a current member/follower of the targeted kennel), and has not already been permanently dismissed or snoozed until a future date. The portal receives the full list in a single round trip and iterates through them client-side.

parameters.name: deviceId
parameters.description: Auth: device ID used to look up the authenticated user and device secret. Validated via HC6.ValidatePortalAuth.

parameters.name: accessToken
parameters.description: Auth: short-lived cryptographic token. Validated via HC6.ValidatePortalAuth with NULL callerParamString.

rowsets.name: ErrorEnvelope
rowsets.description: Returned on auth failure or runtime error.

rowsets.name: PendingNewsflashes
rowsets.description: Zero or more rows, one per newsflash due for this user. Empty result set (not an error envelope) when no newsflashes are pending.

columns.name: imageUrl
columns.description: Optional Azure Blob URL for the header image

columns.name: startDate
columns.description: Date from which this newsflash is active

columns.name: endDate
columns.description: Optional expiry date (inclusive). NULL = no expiry.

breakingChangeRules: Never remove a column from any rowset
Never change the ordering logic (StartDate ASC) without coordinating with the portal client
